stats.reason: Incapsula WAF actively blocking all 25 category URLs as of 2026-05-16 ~10:00. Original scrape (extended/rzecznik_finansowy.py) worked earlier but post-burst the WAF is now blocking even fresh per-request sessions. Re-attempts at any rate return _Incapsula_Resource challenge body (~840 bytes). Mitigation options: (1) wait 24h + retry; (2) use playwright-based fetch (existing playwright_sources/ infrastructure) — JS challenge can be solved by browser; (3) accept that only RF FAQ extracted text (rzecznik_finansowy_faq.jsonl, 374 records) is on disk without raw HTML archive.
